creator: james@digitalciti.com
text:
I have several Compaq DL360's loaded with their latest BIOS.  One they
don't boot with ACPI enabled, seen this problem before in ealier releases,
I just disable it.  The difference now in 6.2 vs a machine I have 6.0
running on is SMP no longer works when compiled in.

The bios detects 2 CPU's, I know if I load 6.0 release on here it will work.

Any known issues with this?

Thanks
James
